tapps-mcp.instructions: TRIGGER POINTS — call these proactively, not reactively: (1) session start → tapps_session_start; (2) before using an unfamiliar library API → tapps_lookup_docs(library) to avoid hallucinated calls; (3) after editing any Python file → tapps_quick_check(file_path) for scoring + quality gate + security scan in one call; (4) before declaring work complete → tapps_validate_changed(file_paths=...) for the batch gate; (5) before refactor/delete → tapps_impact_analysis(file_path) for blast radius; (6) final verification → tapps_checklist(task_type). BENEFIT: deterministic verdicts (no LLM in the tool chain, same input → same output), quality floors enforced (security ≥ 50/100, overall ≥ 70), and every response includes a next_steps hint so the agent knows what to do next. Replaces manual "I'll run the linter" patterns with tool calls the agent invokes itself.

docs-mcp.instructions: TRIGGER POINTS — call these proactively: (1) session start → docs_session_start to inventory existing docs + spot gaps; (2) when user asks "is documentation current?" → docs_check_drift (code-vs-docs) + docs_check_freshness (age) + docs_check_links (broken internal refs); (3) before release → docs_check_completeness + docs_check_style for a release-readiness pass; (4) when creating new docs → docs_generate_readme / _changelog / _release_notes / _api / _adr / _onboarding / _contributing / _prd / _diagram / _architecture / _epic / _story / _purpose / _doc_index / _llms_txt / _frontmatter; (5) for Linear-issue-as-source-of-truth workflows → docs_lint_linear_issue / _validate_linear_issue / _linear_triage. BENEFIT: generates docs deterministically from code + git state (not prose-authored), preserves human-written content via smart-merge markers, and catches drift/broken-links before users do. 35 MCP tools, all read- or generate-and-merge — never destructive.

tapps-brain.instructions: Persistent cross-session memory served by the DEPLOYED tapps-brain HTTP adapter (container tapps-brain-http on agentforge_agentforge-net). Tenant: project_id=tapps-brain (registered via `tapps-brain project register` on 2026-04-17, repo-brain profile). Tools: memory_save/memory_search/memory_recall/memory_consolidate/memory_delete + hive sharing via agent_scope. agent_id=claude-code-wtthornton.
